name: Installing the Retail Express Hardware Certificate on your Apple Mac or PC
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can install the "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": " hardware certificate enabling browser-based POS to communicate securely with local hardware like receipt printers and EFTPOS terminals. This helps optimize your retail operations by enabling cloud-based POS to control local hardware, supporting modern web-based architecture while maintaining traditional retail hardware functionality."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The latest versions of (Safari versions 9.0+) now require a security certificate to be installed in order for your device to be able to communicate with another PC's hardware."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Below will guide through the steps to installing the certificate:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "1. Open this article on your Device"}, {"text": "\n"}, {"text": "2. Click on the download link below which will download the certificate file required."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://www.retailexpressmedia.com/support/drivers/rexca.crt", "children": [{"text": "Download the Certificate file", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "3. You'll then need to click on the downloads button in the top right:"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000zgO0rEAE.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000zgO0rEAE.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "4. You'll see the pop up window as per below appear and all you need to do is click add on this screen:"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000zgO04EAE.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000zgO04EAE.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "5. Next We need to open Documents then click on \"Applications\" on the right and then Utilities and finally open \"Keychain Access\":"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000zgO3vEAE.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000zgO3vEAE.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "6. Now click on the \"Retail Express Root Authority\" option"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000zgO4ZEAU.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000zgO4ZEAU.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "7. Select from the drop down called \"When using the certificate\" choose \"Always Trust\":"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000zgO4jEAE.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000zgO4jEAE.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Now go back into POS, close the browser, re-open, and  revisit Retail Express to test printing to your Receipt Printing."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
